switcher.label: Organization
switcher.noMemberships: You aren't a member of any organization yet.

accessMode.platformOverrideDescription: You're acting on this organization as a platform admin. You aren't a member — owners and other members won't see you on the team.

removed.title: Organization unavailable
removed.description: It may have been deleted or your membership was removed.

error.title: Couldn't load this organization
error.description: Something went wrong fetching the organization. Try again in a moment.

payload.truncated: Payload truncated for display. Use the API for the full event.

empty.title: No audit entries
empty.description: Actions taken in this organization will show up here.

table.title: Pending invitations
table.description: People who have been invited but haven't joined yet.

empty.title: No pending invitations
empty.description: Invite someone to give them access to this organization.

create.title: Invite to organization
create.description: We'll email an invitation link to the address below. You can also copy the link from the next step and share it yourself.
create.successDescription: An email is on its way to {email}. If you'd rather share the link yourself, copy it below.

revoke.title: Revoke invitation for {email}?
revoke.description: The link will stop working immediately. You can issue a new invitation later.

rawToken.warningTitle: This is the only time you'll see this link
rawToken.warningBody: We've also emailed it to the invitee, but if you'd like to send it through another channel, copy it now. The token isn't recoverable once you close this dialog — you'd have to revoke and reissue.

empty.title: No members
empty.description: Invite someone to join this organization.

roleChange.title: Change role
roleChange.hint: You can only assign roles below your own.

remove.removeDescription: They'll immediately lose access to this organization. They can be re-invited later.
remove.leaveDescription: You'll immediately lose access. Another owner or admin will need to invite you back.

edit.title: Organization details
edit.description: Change the display name or the URL slug.

slug.label: Slug
slug.hint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and single hyphens.
slug.invalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and single hyphens. No leading or trailing hyphens.

edit.slugChangeWarning: Changing the slug breaks existing links to this organization. There is no automatic redirect from the old slug.

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.description: Deleting an organization is permanent. Members lose access immediately.

delete.confirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. All members lose access immediately and there is no restore.

noAccess.title: You can't change this organization
noAccess.description: Only members with update or delete permissions can edit settings.

empty.title: No organizations yet
empty.description: Create one to start inviting members.

create.title: Create organization
create.description: Pick a name and a URL slug. The slug can be changed later, but existing links will break.

slug.label: Slug
slug.hint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and single hyphens.
slug.invalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and single hyphens. No leading or trailing hyphens.
